messages.content:
Yo, there maybe a bug if you upload a sheet to the contributor network and its its titled like "example1" and after you publish it and you later delete "example1" and again publish a new cheatsheet but titled again as "example1" it may skip you on the bench mark testing tools. as i made this mistake and all cheats prior to and after +7 hours have been updated with bench mark results while the two i re-published may have been skipped(?), as there are no bench mark results yet?

anyways i suppose if youre looking for last minute bench mark results, try not to duplicate a title published to a prior deleted published version just in case. okok glgl
messages.subject: Contributor network - publish  cheatsheet Bug
